sentences.arabic: الْإِحْسَانُ إِلَى الْجَارِ جُزْءٌ كَبِيرٌ مِنَ الْإِيمَانِ بِاللهِ.
sentences.translation: Dobročinstvo prema komšiji je veliki dio vjerovanja u Allaha.
sentences.translationEn: Being kind to neighbors is a major part of faith in Allah.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ: "مَنْ كَانَ يُؤْمِنُ بِاللهِ وَالْيَوْمِ الْآخِرِ فَلْيُحْسِنْ إِلَى جَارِهِ" [رَوَاهُ مُسْلِمٌ فِي كِتَابِ الْإِيمَانِ، رَقْمُ 48].
sentences.translation: Poslanik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, je rekao: "Ko vjeruje u Allaha i Sudnji dan, neka čini dobro svome komšiji" [Bilježi Muslim u Knjizi o imanu, br. 48].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) said: "Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day, let him be kind to his neighbor" [Reported by Muslim in the Book of Faith, No. 48].

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الصَّحَابَةُ يُقَسِّمُونَ الطَّعَامَ مَعَ جِيرَانِهِمْ بِكَرَمٍ.
sentences.translation: Ashabi su velikodušno dijelili hranu sa svojim komšijama.
sentences.translationEn: The Companions used to share food with their neighbors generously.

sentences.arabic: الْمُسْلِمُ لَا يُؤْذِي جَارَهُ بِالصَّوْتِ الْعَالِي أَوْ بِالْقُمَامَةِ.
sentences.translation: Musliman ne uznemirava svog komšiju galamom ili smećem.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim does not harm his neighbor with loud noises or trash.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْأَخْلَاقُ تَنْشُرُ الْمَحَبَّةَ وَالسَّلَامَ بَيْنَ النَّاسِ.
sentences.translation: Ovakav ahlak (moral) širi ljubav i mir među ljudima.
sentences.translationEn: These morals spread love and peace among people.
